summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LiveEvent redesign (iteration 233). All 20 features verified - backend API 100% pass (12/12 tests), frontend UI 100% pass (20/20 features).
seed_data_creation: Created test signals via Playwright and pytest with TEST_pytest_233 prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: LiveEvent redesign testing complete (iteration 233). All 9 key features verified: (1) Live Impact Panel shows dynamic consequence text with color coding (red for coach_interest/offered_visit, amber for needs_film, green for others). (2) Signal Intelligence Triggers show consequence + suggested next step inline when signal selected. (3) Signals grouped into 4 categories: Coach Signals, Performance, Needs/Risks, Milestones. (4) Upgraded Athlete Selection with photo/name/status indicator dot. (5) School Selection with search input that filters visible schools. (6) Single CTA 'Save & Trigger Actions' + notify checkbox. (7) Interest Micro-Guidance shows text below interest buttons (e.g., 'Active recruiting interest' for Hot). (8) Visual polish dark theme working correctly. (9) Mobile tab toggle switches between Capture and Signals views. Key test IDs: athlete-chip-{id}, school-chip-{id}, school-search-input, interest-{value}, signal-{value}, signal-intelligence, live-impact-panel, save-trigger-btn, notify-athlete-toggle, nav-toggle-btn, signal-cat-{key}. Note: Page has dual rendering (desktop lg:grid + mobile lg:hidden) - use .last locator for mobile viewport testing.
